creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
It should be fixed now. Sorry.

The problem was the conflict resolution during cherry-picking. Indeed only the patch for the AAAA option should have been merged and not other changes.

I went back to 1.17.0. Since the port did not build, this does not require any PORTREVISION/PORTEPOCH bump.

@Jaap: the patch was committed twice: one in main, one in 2023Q1.
